entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","queueStatus","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6|7","819cdc40-3161-4468-b9d4-732a4d5513ca","o|","auto","b|F","a|","2c488620-19b8-4464-afaa-dbaa675981d7","9c6af925-3c0e-40d1-81d7-03d8d88f6ecb","a|E|F|9","id","name","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","rootTaskUuid","feedbackStates","toolUseStates","chatHistory","draftExchange","a|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R|S|T|U","Merge two repositories into one project\n","2026-03-30T13:01:15.234Z","2026-04-01T13:29:26.803Z","claude-haiku-4-5","isAgentConversation","a|a","b|T","o|b|c","a0c0bf33-a607-4055-b7d0-0b8f4604060f","request_message","rich_text_json_repr","status","a|f|g|h","","type","content","a|k|l","doc","a|k","paragraph","o|o|p","a|q","o|m|n|r","draft","o|i|j|s|t","o|V|E|W|X|Y|Z|D|C|C|d|e|A|A|D|u","a|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|S|T|R|U","Fixing Cyoda attachment entity and service timeout\n","2026-04-01T13:38:53.772Z","2026-04-01T19:36:38.463Z","baselineTimestamp","a|a|10","n|0","o|11|c|12","98b01939-9f0e-4329-9fd0-8d533cb9afb2","o|w|F|x|y|z|Z|D|C|C|13|14|A|D|A|u","a|H|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|S|T|R|U","2026-04-01T19:51:34.969Z","2026-04-02T16:11:07.538Z","gpt-5-4","80dfa86f-0cf2-48b6-8e54-da82cbdd2b03","o|16|9|17|18|19|D|C|C|13|1A|A|D|A|u","o|G|v|15|1B","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|1D|1E","o|1F|C|D","o|8|9|A|B|C|D|1C|1G|A"],"1H"]
